text: サラの所へは行かせない！！

私と先代。
二人のクラリスクレイスだ！
易々通れると思うなよ、フォトナー！
We won't let you get to Sarah!

We have two Klariskrayses working together!
Don't think you'll get past us so easily, Photoner!
